description_long: This is a classic, dark wood drawer unit with three stacked drawers, flanked by two matching round side tables. The drawer unit features ornate legs and a decorative lamp with a cream-colored shade placed on top, adding a touch of elegance. Each drawer is equipped with a small metallic knob handle, and the wood finish is polished with a warm brown tone on the surfaces. The side tables have similar wood finishes and curved legs, complementing the central drawer. A modern, black, upholstered chair with wooden legs is positioned nearby, contrasting with the traditional style of the drawer and tables. The overall ensemble suggests a refined, vintage-inspired furniture set suitable for upscale urban interiors or sidewalk displays.
description: A dark wood, three-drawer unit with ornate legs and metallic knobs, flanked by matching round side tables and topped with a decorative lamp. A modern black upholstered chair sits nearby, creating a blend of classic and contemporary styles.
description_view_0: The front view shows the drawer unit with all three drawers and their metallic knobs clearly visible, flanked by two round side tables and topped with a lamp; the black chair is positioned to the right.
description_view_1: From the side, the lamp, stacked drawers, and the rounded back of the black chair are prominent, with the tables partially obscured.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the backs of the side tables and the chair, with the lamp and drawer unit still visible but less detailed.
description_view_3: This view shows the drawer unit and lamp from the opposite side, with the chair's back and angled legs in the foreground and the tables partially hidden.
